rationale: The cited paper appears in the literature overview as one example of empirical paid search research, with a brief note that it documents spillover between generic and branded keywords at an aggregate level. The citing paper does not use that spillover model for its own identification strategy, hypothesis development, variable construction, or estimation procedure. Instead, its core methodological framing relies on work on simultaneous equations and latent instrumental variables. This indicates a background citation rather than a meaningful building block for the present study.
